name: Third party caused my work injury in Boise, sue them too?

mainEntity.name: Third party caused my work injury in Boise, sue them too?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, pursue civil suit against non-employer separately from comp; comp doesn't bar it.[4] Key factors: Prove their fault; comp offsets some. Practical guidance: File comp first for quick benefits; lawyer for personal injury suit. Dual recovery possible.[5] Maximizes total comp.[4]
